hero.label: Export & Global Reach
hero.headline: MANUFACTURED IN GUJARAT. READY FOR THE WORLD.
hero.subheadline: JRP Lubricants — a brand of Jay Trading Company — is fully export-ready. We're seeking distribution partners across the Middle East, Africa, Southeast Asia, and Europe. Full compliance documentation, flexible packaging, and competitive pricing.

regions.headline: WHERE WE WANT TO GROW
regions.subheadline: From our Gujarat manufacturing base, JRP Lubricants is ready to supply distributors, industrial buyers, and OEM partners across these key global markets. We're actively seeking first-mover partners in each region.

items.name: Middle East
items.highlight: A priority target market — strong demand for quality lubricants across GCC industrial and automotive sectors.
items.packagingNote: Arabic labelling available | Halal-compliant formulations on request

items.name: Africa
items.highlight: Fast-growing industrial and automotive sector with strong demand for cost-effective, high-performance lubricants.
items.packagingNote: French & English labelling available | Bulk and drum packaging

items.name: Southeast Asia
items.highlight: Rapidly expanding manufacturing sector driving demand for industrial and automotive lubricants — an ideal entry market.
items.packagingNote: Bahasa, Thai & Vietnamese labelling available | ISO-compliant documentation

items.name: Europe
items.highlight: Premium industrial and specialty lubricant demand met with REACH-compliant formulations. Seeking quality-focused distributors.

items.name: South Asia
items.highlight: Neighbouring markets with fast freight turnaround from Gujarat — ideal for first export partnerships.
items.packagingNote: Multi-language labelling | Flexible MOQ for smaller markets

items.name: Americas & Others
items.highlight: Selective outreach to premium industrial buyers and specialty lubricant distributors in developed markets.

capabilities.headline: END-TO-END EXPORT SUPPORT
capabilities.subheadline: JRP Lubricants handles the full export chain — from formulation and packaging to documentation, compliance, and freight coordination.

items.title: Flexible Packaging
items.description: Available in 1L, 4L, 5L, 20L, 200L drums, and bulk IBC containers. Custom private-label packaging for distributors.

items.title: Compliance Documentation
items.description: Full export documentation including Certificate of Origin, MSDS/SDS, COA, Packing List, and country-specific compliance certificates.

items.title: Private Labelling
items.description: White-label and private-label programs for distributors and OEMs. Custom formulations, branding, and packaging available.

items.title: Freight & Logistics
items.description: FCL and LCL sea freight, air freight for urgent orders. Partnerships with major freight forwarders for competitive rates.

items.title: Custom Formulations
items.description: Bespoke lubricant development for specific climate conditions, equipment requirements, or regulatory standards.

items.title: Technical Support
items.description: Dedicated export technical team providing product selection guidance, application support, and field troubleshooting.

compliance.headline: INTERNATIONALLY CERTIFIED QUALITY
compliance.subheadline: Every JRP export shipment is backed by internationally recognised certifications and rigorous quality documentation.

items.name: ISO 9001:2015
items.description: Quality Management System — consistent product quality across every batch.

items.name: API Certified
items.description: American Petroleum Institute standards for automotive and industrial lubricants.

items.name: BIS Certified
items.description: Bureau of Indian Standards certification for domestic and export markets.

items.name: REACH Compliant
items.description: EU chemical regulation compliance for European export markets.

items.name: MSDS / SDS
items.description: Full Material Safety Data Sheets available for all products in multiple languages.

steps.title: Submit Inquiry
steps.description: Send us your product requirements, destination country, volume, and packaging preferences via our export inquiry form.

steps.title: Quotation & Samples
steps.description: We provide a detailed quotation within 48 hours. Product samples available on request for quality evaluation.

steps.title: Order Confirmation
steps.description: Confirm your order with agreed terms. We begin production scheduling and packaging preparation.

steps.title: Quality Check & Dispatch
steps.description: Every batch undergoes QC testing before dispatch. Full documentation package prepared and shared.

steps.title: Shipment & Tracking
steps.description: Goods dispatched via your preferred freight mode. Tracking details and shipping documents provided promptly.

cta.headline: BECOME OUR FIRST EXPORT PARTNER
cta.subheadline: We're actively looking for distributors, industrial buyers, and OEM partners to grow with. Get in touch — let's build something together.
